creator: amdmi3@FreeBSD.org
text:
Does not build with DOCS disabled:

===>  Staging for tautulli-2.1.38
===>   tautulli-2.1.38 depends on package: py27-sqlite3>0 - found
===>   tautulli-2.1.38 depends on package: py27-openssl>0 - found
===>   tautulli-2.1.38 depends on file: /usr/local/share/certs/ca-root-nss.crt - found
===>   tautulli-2.1.38 depends on file: /usr/local/bin/python2.7 - found
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===> Creating groups.
===> Creating users
/bin/mkdir -p /wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/tautulli/work/stage/usr/local/www/tautulli/data /wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/tautulli/work/stage/usr/local/www/tautulli/lib  /wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/tautulli/work/stage/usr/local/www/tautulli/plexpy
cd /wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/tautulli/work/Tautulli-2.1.38 && /bin/sh -c '(/usr/bin/find -Ed $1 $3 | /usr/bin/cpio -dumpl $2 >/dev/null 2>&1) &&  /usr/bin/find -Ed $1 $3 \(   -type d -exec /bin/sh -c '\''cd '\''$2'\'' && chmod 755 "$@"'\'' . {} +  -o -type f 
-exec /bin/sh -c '\''cd '\''$2'\'' && chmod 0644 "$@"'\'' . {} + \)' COPYTREE_SHARE "data lib plexpy" /wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/tautulli/work/stage/usr/local/www/tautulli
install  -m 555 /wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/tautulli/work/Tautulli-2.1.38/Tautulli.py /wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/tautulli/work/stage/usr/local/www/tautulli
/usr/bin/find -s /wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/tautulli/work/stage/usr/local/www/tautulli -type d -empty -delete
/usr/bin/find -s /wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/tautulli/work/stage -not -type d | /usr/bin/sort |  /usr/bin/sed -e 's#^/wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/tautulli/work/stage/usr/local/##' >> /wrkdirs/usr/ports/multimedia/tautulli/work/.PLIST.mktmp
====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===> Staging rc.d startup script(s)
===========================================================================
====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
Error: Missing: %%WWWDIR%%/CHANGELOG.md
===> Error: Plist issues found.
